vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The visual data indicates a severe discrepancy between the registry and physical reality. The expected specimens (P1-P4) are not visible or are in a state of total senescence/absence.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant material detected in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant material detected in the black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: The white rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is absent.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant material detected.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor present; soil appears undisturbed but devoid of vegetation.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dry and inert across all containers.
biome_observations.surface_debris: White particulate matter (likely perlite or mineral residue) is visible in the black pot containing the rabbit anchor.
biome_observations.lighting_impact: The low-light/cool spectrum environment is insufficient to discern fine biological detail, but the lack of chlorophyll-reflectance confirms the absence of living foliage.

temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: No change; ambient light levels decrease, obscuring detail.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: No change; total absence of biological activity.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological failure. There is no evidence of plant life in any of the registered pots.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the registered botanical specimens. The white rabbit anchor is the only non-soil element remaining.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a multi-stage audit of the provided image sequence. My first step was to calibrate the visual field against the provided registry. Upon validation, it is clear that the registry does not match the physical reality of the desk. The pots are essentially empty, containing only soil and substrate. There is no evidence of the String of Nickels, Mexican Mint, Pothos, or Silver Guest. The biome is currently inactive.
